user_story: As a Project admin, I want to view the resource management email templates list, so that I can manage project and resource related emails
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Resource Management Email Templates screen; When the list loads; Then I see the Email type, Description and Task columns

user_story: As a Project admin, I want to open and view a specific resource email template such as Project is closed, so that I can review its content
acceptance_criteria: Given the resource email templates are listed; When I click View on a row; Then the template content is displayed

user_story: As a Project admin, I want to refresh the resource management email templates list, so that I see the latest configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Resource Management Email Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads

user_story: As a Project admin, I want to switch to the Notification Templates view for resource management, so that I can manage notifications alongside emails
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Resource Management Email Templates screen; When I select the Notification Templates tab; Then the notification templates are shown

user_story: As a Project admin, I want to cancel out of the resource email templates screen, so that I can return to the previous page
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Resource Management Email Templates screen; When I click Cancel; Then I am navigated away
